# Ninja-360 Digital Media

> Ninja-360 is a Kansas City local-visibility system. We help local businesses get
> found and chosen on Google with professional media (drone photography, 360 virtual
> tours, Matterport, video) and ongoing Google Business Profile optimization. Our
> method is the M.A.P. System: Make (capture the right visuals), Amplify (publish to
> Google), Promote (keep you visible). Founded and run by Tim Petet, a Google
> Certified Photographer based in Kansas City.

## Key facts
- Business: Ninja-360 Digital Media (local visibility / local SEO studio)
- Founder: Tim Petet, Google Certified Photographer
- Service area: Kansas City metro (Missouri & Kansas)
- Phone: (844) 360-6465
- Site: https://ninja360.net
- Positioning: a local VISIBILITY system, not a "virtual tour company." Tours, drone,
  and video are the proof; the product is getting local businesses found and chosen.

## Core pages
- [Home](https://ninja360.net/): the problem (invisible on Google) and the M.A.P. fix.
- [How It Works](https://ninja360.net/how-it-works): the M.A.P. System explained — Make, Amplify, Promote.
- [Pricing](https://ninja360.net/pricing): three plans — White Belt $99/mo, Brown Belt $499/mo, Black Belt $999/mo.
- [Services](https://ninja360.net/services): drone, Google & custom 360 tours, Matterport, photo/video, GBP optimization, local listings.
- [About](https://ninja360.net/about): founder Tim Petet — Google Certified Photographer; why Ninja-360 exists.
- [Our Work](https://ninja360.net/work): portfolio by industry.

## Work by industry
- [Restaurants](https://ninja360.net/work/restaurants): flagship — 54th Street Grill, a 15+ location chain across MO & TX.
- [Real Estate](https://ninja360.net/work/real-estate): residential & commercial 360 tours.
- [Automotive](https://ninja360.net/work/automotive), [Gyms & Fitness](https://ninja360.net/work/gyms-fitness), [Hotels & Hospitality](https://ninja360.net/work/hospitality), [Schools & Athletics](https://ninja360.net/work/schools), [Parks & Events](https://ninja360.net/work/parks-events), [Medical & Dental](https://ninja360.net/work/medical-dental), [Wellness & Chiropractic](https://ninja360.net/work/wellness-chiro).

## Offer
- Free Visibility Audit (30 seconds): https://ninja360.net/#section-JXWJCHUYEK — every engagement starts here.
